title: 1.1: Tests that AssumeRole returns valid temporary credentials for a user with bucket access policy
1.2: Tests that STS temporary credentials can perform operations allowed by the parent user policy
1.3: Tests that STS temporary credentials are denied operations not in the parent user policy
1.4: Tests that a deny policy is created with an explicit Deny statement for a specific action
1.5: Tests that STS temporary credentials inherit deny policy and are blocked from the denied action
1.6: Tests that a tag-based conditional policy is created with tag conditions for access control
1.7: Tests that STS temporary credentials respect tag-based conditional permissions
1.8: Tests that a user belongs to a group with an attached policy for group permission inheritance
1.9: Tests that STS temporary credentials inherit permissions from the parent user's group policy
2.1: Places all STS AssumeRole integration tests in the cmd/ directory
3.1: All tests use Go testing framework with *testing.T or compatible test struct
3.2: All tests follow the TestXxx or test method naming pattern
3.3: All tests use context.WithTimeout for operations
3.4: All tests use defer cancel() for context cleanup
3.5: All tests use STSAssumeRole struct from credentials package to call AssumeRole
3.6: All tests create MinIO client with STS credentials for validation
4.1: Tests create IAM user with generated credentials before AssumeRole
4.2: Tests create bucket with random name for isolation
